task_completion.description: Access patient Diana Prince's chart in OSCAR EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR eChart, master record, or demographic page is open, clearly displaying the patient name 'Diana Prince'.
An 'Antenatal Record 1', 'AR1', or 'Ontario Antenatal Record' form/window is open within the EMR interface for Diana Prince.

task_completion.description: Enter the Last Menstrual Period (LMP) date
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'LMP' (Last Menstrual Period) field in the Antenatal Record is filled with a date that is exactly 8 weeks prior to the system's current date.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Estimated Date of Delivery (EDD) is calculated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'EDD' (Estimated Date of Delivery) field in the Antenatal Record is populated with a calculated date (typically 280 days after the entered LMP).
A confirmation message, a closed form returning to the updated eChart, or the saved Antenatal Record appearing in the patient's list of forms/documents, indicating the save action was successful.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OSCAR EMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR system, not a local HTML file, text editor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the EMR menus and typing into form fields, rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the final state using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text to falsely show a saved record or calculated EDD.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Diana Prince. DOB: 1995-05-15. The Last Menstrual Period (LMP) must be set to exactly 8 weeks prior to the task execution date. The Estimated Date of Delivery (EDD) should be automatically calculated (typically LMP + 280 days, following Naegele's Rule).
